headline: Domino’s Shrugs Off Mixed Q2 Results, Promises Better Days Ahead
summary: Though Domino's Pizza didn't meet its same-store sales estimates in Q2, the company is the dominant legacy pizza brand right now, according to company officials, who said its overall competitive position has never been stronger while its competitors have never…

headline: Domino's CEO Russell Weiner Sells 10,850 Shares for $3.6 Million -- Should Investors Be Worried?
summary: Weiner exercised and sold options under a pre-established Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, reducing direct holdings by 20% while retaining a $15.2 million equity stake.
